actions.intent: Reject the upper-left bait and take the lower hero-rescue B pair first, accepting real dock residue instead of a free triple.
Open the secondary puppy to one-clear-away after the hero rescue lands.
Finish the secondary puppy with the readable right-side B clear and recover the dock triple.

notes: Designer-approved tuned hero route: hero first, secondary to one-clear-away, then final right-side rescue clear.
